states.description: Fresh state shows Surface Stone selected, Copper locked, empty resources, progress bar, miner action stage, future activity tabs, and upgrade affordance.
states.notes: Strict responsive product gate v003 covers the fresh landscape read.

states.description: Mining tick visibly increments Stone and Mining XP and reads as an action-stage hit/reward moment.
states.notes: Motion proof shows Ozz/KayKit pose, hit FX, reward callout, and progress reset.

states.description: Copper Vein is visible but blocked before Mining Lv2, with a clear locked reason.
states.notes: Portrait proof shows Copper Vein as Lv2 locked while Surface Stone runs.

states.description: At Mining Lv2, Copper Vein can be selected and the selected node/progress interval update.
states.notes: DevAPI state shows selected_node=copper_vein, mining_level=2, interval_seconds=5, and upgrade_affordable=false.

states.description: Copper Pickaxe button explains exact missing Stone, Copper, and Coins when the player cannot buy it.
states.notes: Portrait proof shows missing Stone/Copper/Coins rows and compact Need action.

states.description: Copper Pickaxe button changes to an affordable state when resources are sufficient.
states.notes: DevAPI state shows upgrade_affordable=true with Stone 6, Copper 32, Coins 32.

states.description: Buying Copper Pickaxe spends resources, marks it equipped, and shows the speed change.
states.notes: DevAPI state shows copper_pickaxe=true, resources spent, and interval reduced to 2.55s.

states.description: Periodic geode reward reads as a special event rather than a silent state change.
states.notes: Four-shot v003 covers geode reward in landscape and portrait.

states.description: The screen remains readable and non-overlapping at a smaller native window size.
states.notes: 720x480 proof hides the second future-activity row and keeps node rows above the bottom nav; readability audit passes.
